overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character running through a snowy, overcast winter landscape. The character follows a muddy trail toward and past a wooden cabin, encountering a horse-drawn carriage near the end of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail approaching wooden cabin

events.description: a distant dark figure briefly appears on the path ahead before disappearing

agents.ego_description: running steadily through the snow-covered trail toward a distant wooden cabin

entered.detail: snow-dusted rocky slope with sparse vegetation lining the left side of the trail
small rustic wooden cabin with snow-covered roof visible in the distance
cluster of trees with snow-laden branches on the left side
scattered trees with snow-covered branches on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a snowy trail through an open winter landscape. A rocky hillside lines the left while snow-covered trees dot the terrain ahead. In the distance, a wooden cabin sits at the end of the path, and a mysterious figure briefly appears far ahead before vanishing.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing the wooden cabin on snowy trail

events.description: character passes the wooden cabin on the right side and continues toward the valley

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the trail, passing the cabin and heading toward an open valley view

entered.detail: snowy valley with scattered buildings and trees visible in the distance beyond the cabin
tall prominent tree with bare snow-covered branches near the cabin

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the wooden cabin, which moves from the center to the right side of the frame. A large leafless tree becomes prominent near the path, and the view opens up to reveal a distant snowy valley. The rocky hillside recedes behind as the character continues along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy trail with horse-drawn carriage crossing

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters from the right and crosses the path in front of the character

agents.ego_description: running along the trail as a horse-drawn carriage passes by from right to left

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving quickly from right to left across the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the snowy trail with the wooden cabin now far behind on the right. A horse-drawn carriage suddenly enters from the right, crossing the path in front of the character before exiting to the left, leaving wheel tracks in the snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy trail that leads from an open winter landscape past a lonely cabin and into a wide valley. It begins with the character running through a frozen expanse, flanked by a rocky hillside on the left and snow-covered trees ahead, while a mysterious figure briefly appears in the distance. As the character advances, the scene shifts to pass a wooden cabin that slides from the center to the right of the frame, opening the view toward a distant snowy valley as a large leafless tree looms over the path. The camera then continues forward, leaving the cabin far behind, before a horse-drawn carriage suddenly cuts across the trail from right to left. The movement finally settles on the fresh wheel tracks left in the snow as the carriage exits the frame.
